parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant IntegrationTest
participant "Spring\nApplication" as SpringApp
participant "De /nSerializer" as Serializer
participant "info:AddMember\nRequestInfoDTO" as InfoDTO
participant "ctrl:AddMember\nToGroupController" as Controller
participant "AddMember\nRequestAssembler" as RequestAssembler
participant "requestDTO:\nAddMemberRequestDTO" as RequestDTO
participant "AddMemberResponse\nDTOAssembler" as ResponseAssembler
participant "groupRespDTO:\nGroupResponseDTO" as GroupRespDTO
participant "srv:AddMember\nToGroupService" as Service

note over Service: Continues through\nnext Diagram

activate IntegrationTest
IntegrationTest -> SpringApp : **1** POST\n/groups/"Family"/\nmembers/"ana@gmail.com"
activate SpringApp

SpringApp -> Serializer : **1.1** deserialize("groupDesc":"Family",\n"personEmail":"ana@gmail.com")
activate Serializer
Serializer -> InfoDTO ** : **1.1.1** create (groupDesc,\nPersonEmail)
deactivate Serializer

SpringApp -> Controller : **1.2** addMember(info)
activate Controller

Controller -> RequestAssembler : **1.2.1** addMemberMapToDTO\n(info.getGroupDescription(),\ninfo.getPersonEmail())
activate RequestAssembler
RequestAssembler -> RequestDTO ** : **1.2.1.1** create
deactivate RequestAssembler

Controller -> Service : **1.2.2** addMemeber(requestDTO)
Service --> Controller : **1.2.3** groupDTO

Controller -> ResponseAssembler : **1.2.4** mapToGroupResponseDTO(GroupDTO)
activate ResponseAssembler
ResponseAssembler -> GroupRespDTO ** : **1.2.4.1** create
deactivate ResponseAssembler

Controller --> SpringApp : **1.2.5** groupRespDTO
deactivate Controller

SpringApp --> SpringApp : **1.2.6** ResponseEntity(groupRespDTO,\nHttpStatus.OK)

SpringApp -> Serializer : **1.3** serialize(ResponseEntity(groupRespDTO,\nHttpStatus.OK))
activate Serializer
Serializer --> SpringApp : **1.4** HttpResponse
deactivate Serializer

SpringApp --> IntegrationTest : **1.5** HttpResponse
deactivate SpringApp
deactivate IntegrationTest

@enduml
```
